final_production_summary.fallback_visual_style: Python/PIL generated slides retained as zero-paid-token backup

integrated_timeline.visual: Laptop opening, keyboard typing, safe demo code on screen.
integrated_timeline.subtitle: 在資訊工程的學習裡，一個想法可以從草稿開始，慢慢變成真的能運作的系統。
integrated_timeline.editing_note: Use quick cuts; avoid private screen content.

integrated_timeline.visual: Campus or classroom establishing shots with department name text overlay.
integrated_timeline.subtitle: 從程式設計出發，我們學習分析問題、拆解需求，並用技術做出清楚的解決方法。
integrated_timeline.editing_note: Use text title instead of unauthorized logo.

integrated_timeline.visual: Code screen, whiteboard keywords, notes, and demo operation.
integrated_timeline.subtitle: 課程不只是在寫程式，也包含資料處理、人工智慧、系統設計、網路與各種實際應用。
integrated_timeline.editing_note: Avoid ranking or unverified equipment claims.

integrated_timeline.visual: Group discussion, screen pointing, whiteboard planning, and demo presentation.
integrated_timeline.subtitle: 透過專題實作和團隊合作，我們把課堂上的知識轉換成可以展示、可以改進的作品。
integrated_timeline.editing_note: Use consenting participants or crop faces.

integrated_timeline.visual: Debugging, checklist, revision, and rerun/save action.
integrated_timeline.subtitle: 每一次討論、測試和除錯，都是累積經驗的過程，也讓作品更接近完成。
integrated_timeline.editing_note: Crop terminal usernames, tokens, and private paths.

integrated_timeline.visual: Campus closing shot or clean title card.
integrated_timeline.subtitle: 在這裡，我們用程式連結創意與實作，讓資訊能力成為面向未來的力量。
integrated_timeline.editing_note: Fade out cleanly; keep final title readable.

before_shooting: Prepare safe demo code or mock screens.
Confirm who will appear on camera and get consent.
Plan 10-15 short clips so editing is flexible.
during_editing: Keep final length between 55 and 65 seconds.
Add subtitles from outputs/subtitles.srt or equivalent burned-in captions.
Remove or blur private screen information.
after_export: Update outputs/asset_sources.md with real footage source and consent notes.
Check README and report still point to the correct final video.
Confirm the GitHub repo is public before Ecourse submission.

repository_status.agent_files: Complete and optimized for self-shot workflow
repository_status.storyboard: Detailed self-shot storyboard available at outputs/video_storyboard.md
repository_status.final_video: Submitted self-edited video is stored at outputs/final_video.mp4
repository_status.asset_sources: Updated with final video, subtitle, audio, fallback, and safety notes
